caption: A man with a beard, wearing a white shirt and a dark grey waistcoat, speaks into a crowd of microphones held by various reporters. He is surrounded by other men, including one wearing a white cap. The scene takes place outdoors during the day. Several microphones are visible, some bearing logos such as "ANI." The frames are overlaid with news graphics. At the top, a red bar reads "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and a "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is in the corner. Sidebars list names like "डिंटी CM," "सब्रत चौधरी," "विजय सिन्हा," "मंत्री," "संतोष सुमन," and "सुमित कुमार," accompanied by small headshot photos. A bottom red banner states "JDU कोटे से श्रवण कुमार मंत्री बने," with a time stamp of "10:03 PM" and a "MAHASAKSHI" logo. Across the frames, the speaker's expression and mouth movements change as he speaks, while the surrounding crowd and graphical overlays remain constant.
